description:
The DebugFeed component sends a list of Categories, then Labels, then finally String field values which are driven by the generated templates by a feed Mapper.

See Data Feeds.

fields.CategoryCount: The amount of categories to put at the beginning of the feed.
fields.LabelItemCount: The amount of label Feed items to put at the beginning of the feed.
fields.StringItemCount: The amount of String fields generated by the feed.
fields.StringValues: Is automatically filled with values driven by the content of Feed value fields generated by the feed mapper creating templates from the data in this feed.
